PreToolUse.description: Block git commits that bypass hooks (--no-verify)

hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\-\-no-verify' && echo '[BLOCKED] Do not bypass git hooks with --no-verify' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

PostToolUse.description: Check written .tsx files for Horizon convention violations
Check edited .tsx files for Horizon convention violations

Stop.description: Extract learnings from session at end
